heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 17096 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out sections 434 through 439 and 482 $4,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2012, to remain available until expended.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 434 through 439, referred to in text, are sections 434 to 439 of , which enacted sections 17091 to 17095 of this title and amended . Section 482 is unidentifiable because does not contain a section 482.Pub. L. 110–140section 8253 of this titlePub. L. 110–140
Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2
amendments: References in TextSections 434 through 439, referred to in text, are sections 434 to 439 of , which enacted sections 17091 to 17095 of this title and amended . Section 482 is unidentifiable because does not contain a section 482.Pub. L. 110–140section 8253 of this titlePub. L. 110–140
